description: Crafted from soft, genuine leather, this Midway wallet from fossil is a must-have accessory for the well-dressed male. Fossil perfects this traditional accessory's foray into modern wardrobes with its classic techniques and innovative designs. Carry your monetary essentials with ease in this classic wallet. Comes in a vintage style tin.Dimensions: 12 cm x 9 cmTwo main compartmentsTwo slip pockets for coins on either sideA flap on the left side with three card holder slots and a slip pocket on one side and a mesh id slot on the otherThree card holder slots under the flapOne buttonable pocket on the right with steel brand badge Branding embossed on the frontCareRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
